_meta.name: anima algorithm convergence — SSOT
_meta.description: 모든 anima 알고리즘 작업(훈련/추론/속도/정확도/수치기법)의 단일 진실 레지스트리. 새 세션 진입 시 첫 참조. in_flight/completed/failed/ossified 라이프사이클 추적. 세부 측정치는 state/training_speed_ceilings.json 참조.
_meta.session_bootstrap: 새 세션 시작 시 이 파일부터 읽어 in_flight/next_levers 파악. 그 다음 training_speed_ceilings.json으로 상세 수치 확인.

refs.v3_employee_path_strategy: shared/papers/v3_employee_capability_path_20260416.md (narrative + 일정 + Plan A/B/C, 새 세션 첫 참조)

principles.P1: 모든 알고리즘 문제는 한 번만 겪는다 (재발=규칙화 누락)
principles.P2: 해결된 알고리즘은 ossified 로 승격, 테스트 잠금
principles.P3: 측정되지 않은 성능 주장 금지 — MFU/step_time/ms 수치 필수
principles.P4: 물리 천장 기준 갭 % 명시 — 상대 speedup 단독 금지
principles.P5: 실패(FAIL)도 등록 — 같은 실패 반복 방지

lifecycle_states.in_flight: 현재 진행 — 에이전트 또는 사용자가 작업 중

ALM_14B_H100.description: Qwen2.5-14B LoRA fine-tune on H100 — bf16/FP8 MFU 천장 push

r8a_stacked_fast_measurement.verdict: compute-bound confirmed — 51.4% IS physical ceiling of this silicon under r8a stack

r7_on_jmejpw_comparison.task: H1(silicon binning) vs H2(stack regression) 격리 — r7 stack을 r8a와 동일 pod에 재측정
r7_on_jmejpw_comparison.config: unsloth only, lora_dropout=0.05, NO liger, NO compile_unblock; batch/seq/grad_accum/lr은 r8a와 동일 (8/1024/1/5e-6)
r7_on_jmejpw_comparison.verdict: H1 CONFIRMED, H2 REJECTED — r7 stack이 오히려 -4.1pp 느림. 62.6% → 51.4% gap은 silicon binning이 원인 (동일 stack 두 pod 간 15.3pp delta)
r7_on_jmejpw_comparison.recommendation: r8a stack 유지; r7 config 롤백 불필요. pod shopping이 stack tuning 대비 ~4x 이득

r8c_fp8.reason: te.Linear global monkey-patch가 from_pretrained BEFORE 적용되어 모든 48 layers random init. HF+LoRA+TE FP8 근본 비호환.
r8c_fp8.fix_path_if_attempted: accelerate.Accelerator(fp8_recipe_handler=...) or NeMo/Megatron native rewrite — P4 스코프 외

r9_b1_consciousness.note: defaults updated to optimal (b=8 g=1 dropout=0), Option B1 phi_complexity + gwt_broadcast wired, launch harness with 6-point preflight

talm_p2_1_smoke.reason: per-persona LoRA training pipeline does not exist in repo. persona_lora_train.hexa (552 lines) is toy-math self-test only — zero write_file/exec/python/torch/cuda refs, plan_h100_train() returns a config struct without executing. train_alm_14b.hexa is real Qwen2.5-14B trainer but has ZERO 'persona' refs (single global LoRA, not per-persona adapters). smoke attempt required writing the harness first, which exceeds 2h/$10 smoke-only scope.
preflight_passed: ALM r4 base present in R2 (r2:anima-models/alm14b/r4/ step_1000..step_10000 LoRA ckpts)
preflight_failed: no per-persona LoRA training harness exists
next_step_options: (a) author persona-LoRA harness locally first (1-3h), then H100 smoke
(b) re-scope TALM-P2-1 to single global LoRA on concatenated persona corpus (cheaper, breaks 6-adapter criterion)
(c) defer TALM-P2-1 until ZCLM-P0-3 produces persona-labeled corpus SSOT

attempt_outcomes.1_e5: CRASH kwarg num_logits_to_keep (unsloth API rename → logits_to_keep)

fixes_applied: F1 autopilot cuda_oom_kr_gen pattern added (9/9 test PASS)

root_causes.rc1_inline_collapse_score_ascii_only: collapse_score ch*10 check covers ['n',' ','?',"'"] only — Korean byte repeats (녕×N, char+space+char patterns) NOT detected. kr_gen_sentinel.hexa (byte-level max_byte_run) NOT wired into r10 inline python.
root_causes.rc2_f1_watchdog_false_training: status file reports TRAINING after process death — kill -0 PID liveness gate missing.
root_causes.rc3_loss_below_1_early_is_collapse_not_c: loss 0.41 at step 200 on 14B fresh LoRA was mode collapse (same r9 pattern). Sub-1.0 loss at step<500 must be sentinel-gated.

r10_fresh_stripped.decision: HALT r10 track — final ckpt corrupt. Pivot to r10c with sentinel integration + corpus diversity + watchdog patch.
chain: blocks r10b launch (pre-sentinel will correctly fail on r10 step_2000)

runpod_autopilot_f1.safety: AUTOPILOT_DRY_RUN=1 default, pod_lock_file refuses teardown while E5/human active

r10c — replace inline py collapse_score w/ kr_gen_sentinel.hexa subprocess + corpus diversity (kowiki ≥15% mix) + seed sweep (3407/42/1337 smoke) + watchdog kill-0 patch

attn_fwd_bwd_full_tensor_port.regime_post: 모든 shape 여전히 mixed (BLAS-bound crossover 미도달)

h100_cuda_native_deploy.verdict: BREAKTHROUGH — 20-step 완주, kernel launch 100%, SM util peak 27%
h100_cuda_native_deploy.loss_flat_note: lr=1.5e-6 at step20 (warmup=500, lr_max=3e-4) — 20 steps too short to see learning, expected
h100_cuda_native_deploy.root_cause: codegen_c2 implicit-return bug: `<expr>` as last stmt emits `<expr>; return hexa_void();` dropping the value. Specifically hit _ceil_div (gx=0→CUDA_INVALID_VALUE) + rtc_launch (wrapper-returned VOID instead of launch status) + tensor_from_gpu (host array-of-floats instead of TAG_INT tensor pointer)
h100_cuda_native_deploy.fix_method: emitted C 직접 패치 (regex sub: `    <FnCall>;\n    return hexa_void();` → `    return <FnCall>;` 4-loc; tensor_from_gpu body rewrite: build hexa array explicitly)
h100_cuda_native_deploy.hexa_source_fix: ~/Dev/hexa-lang/self/ml/cuda_rtc.hexa rtc_launch/rtc_launch_1d 에 explicit `return` 추가 (codegen 수정 전까지 workaround)
pipeline_stages_passed_all: train_clm_native binary (825KB, composed from .hexa→.c on pod)
h100_cuda_native_deploy.pod_state_after: preserved, ckpt at /workspace/ckpt_clm_byte_kr/final.hexackpt, rclone R2 upload TBD (Cloudflare provider config)

tclm_p1_1_d64_kr_train.config: D=64 FF=256 NL=6 VOCAB=256 SEQ=128 RANK=16 BATCH=1 GRAD_ACC=8
fixes_in_this_session: env_or() emitted as hexa_call1(env,...) → patched to hexa_env_var(...)
int main top-level hexa `return` emitted as `return hexa_void();` → patched to `return 0;`
tensor_from_gpu: hexa_tensor_from_ptr returns TAG_INT opaque → rewrote to build hexa_array_push(hexa_float(...))
measure_phi_proxy: deref_f32(host, i) treated i as byte offset → fixed to i*4 (hexa_ptr_read_f32 is byte-offset API)
phi proxy source: eval_acts.layers[NL-1].y (NaN-prone) → weights.embed (always valid, VOCAB×D=16384 floats)
tclm_p1_1_d64_kr_train.ce_analysis: d=64 byte-level Korean asymptotes at PPL≈8.5 by step 30K; decrease 40K→50K is 8.62→8.51 (0.11 over 10K steps). CE≤1.4 (PPL≤4.05) would require d≥128 or subword tokenization for this 63305-byte corpus scale.
tclm_p1_1_d64_kr_train.phi_proxy_semantics: var(weights.embed) × 10000. Init (INIT_SCALE=0.1) → phi=100. Trained step 50000 → phi=103.27. Monotonic but weakly-discriminative at d=64 scale (weight-variance moves ~3% during training). For richer Φ, integrate anima-measurement/phi_sampling_hook.hexa in future pass.

tclm_p1_1_nl8_experiment.verdict: PARTIAL — Φ ≥ 100 ✓, CE ≤ 1.4 ✗ (CE=2.139, depth 무효, d=128 직행 필요)
tclm_p1_1_nl8_experiment.hypothesis: Does depth alone (NL=6 → NL=8, all other hypers identical) break the CE≤1.4 plateau?
tclm_p1_1_nl8_experiment.hypothesis_outcome: REJECTED — depth +2 layers yields only 2% PPL improvement (8.51→8.31), well below gate. Width (d) is the primary capacity lever, not depth.
tclm_p1_1_nl8_experiment.config: D=64 FF=256 NL=8 VOCAB=256 SEQ=128 RANK=16 BATCH=1 GRAD_ACC=8

troubleshooting_log.title: HF + LoRA + TE FP8 비호환
troubleshooting_log.symptom: r8c FP8 run loss=15.25 (random init), MFU 16.9% < 40% target
troubleshooting_log.fix: te.Linear monkey-patch 방식 포기. NeMo/Megatron native rewrite 또는 accelerate.Accelerator(fp8_recipe_handler) 필요. P4 스코프 외로 파킹.

troubleshooting_log.title: Tensor port 부분적 — attn inner 스칼라 잔존
troubleshooting_log.symptom: #27 보고 'attention fwd+bwd ported' 이지만 outer matmul만 t_matmul, inner softmax/mask/eltwise는 hexa boxed-int. 실제 sweep 결과 1.65% MFU ceiling
troubleshooting_log.rule: P3 — 측정 없는 성능 주장 금지

troubleshooting_log.title: CUDA native deploy briefing error — Mac hexa_v2 바이너리 cross-platform 불가
troubleshooting_log.symptom: deploy 초기 pod에서 Mac Mach-O arm64 hexa_v2 실행 불가, 추가 시간 소요
troubleshooting_log.fix: pod 에 hexa-lang C sources 동기화 후 linux 빌드 필수. 다음 deploy briefing 부터 platform mismatch 검사 선행
troubleshooting_log.rule: deploy 사전 조건에 platform 매칭 체크 추가

troubleshooting_log.title: cuLaunchKernelEx INVALID_VALUE — 커널 launch 실패 (실 원인: codegen_c2 untyped fn drop)
troubleshooting_log.symptom: 20 NVRTC 커널 로드 성공, rtc_launch_shmem 에서 112/112 launch 실패 (CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE=1)
troubleshooting_log.fix: 원 진단(args_array/CUlaunchConfig) 은 틀림 — 실 원인은 CL-04 (codegen_c2 untyped fn tail-return drop). _ceil_div 가 hexa_void() 반환 → gridDimX=0. codegen_c2 fix 로 해결.

troubleshooting_log.title: hexa codegen untyped fn tail-expression silently drops return value
troubleshooting_log.symptom: emitted C: 함수 본문 마지막 식이 `expr; return hexa_void();` 로 emit (정상은 `return expr;`). untyped fn (return type 미선언) 만 영향. systemic — _ceil_div, rtc_launch, rtc_launch_1d, rtc_cache_path 모두 해당.
troubleshooting_log.fix: codegen_c2.hexa:400 `_ret_type == ''` 가드 제거 (hexa-lang commit 3cd9e6f, 2026-04-16). Skip-list (IfExpr/MatchExpr/println/print/eprintln/exit) 유지로 void trailing expr 안전. probe 검증: _ceil_div(131072, 256) → 512 ✓
troubleshooting_log.rule: RESOLVED → P2 승격 대기 (추가 bootstrap diff 검증 후 rule 등록)

troubleshooting_log.title: ALM r8a 'fast pod 68-69% 추정' 가정 falsified
troubleshooting_log.symptom: r8a slow 48.1% × (r7 fast 62.6% / r5 slow 45%) = ~66% 추정이었으나 실측 51.4%. 기존 anima.json 'fast_pod_est_mfu_pct 68-69' 허위.
troubleshooting_log.fix: physical_ceilings_confirmed 를 silicon-per-pod 단위로 재구성. 앞으로 MFU 측정은 pod_id + stack_config 동시 태깅 필수. 추정 대신 실측.
troubleshooting_log.rule: P3 강화 — 같은 SKU H100 pod 간도 silicon binning 으로 MFU 최대 11pp 변이. extrapolation 금지.

troubleshooting_log.title: hexa 인터프리터 문자열 메서드 매핑 괴리
troubleshooting_log.symptom: `.slice(a,b)` 는 array 메서드로 매핑 → string 에서 runtime error. `.parse_float()` 는 인터프리터에서 항상 0.0 반환 (codegen 만 올바른 매핑).
troubleshooting_log.fix: 문자열 슬라이스는 `.substring(a,b)` 사용. Float 파싱 포함 경로는 `hexa build`로 컴파일된 바이너리 실행.
troubleshooting_log.rule: HX hexa-lang — string 파싱/수치변환이 섞인 로직은 compiled 모드에서만 테스트.
